subcodes.first_line: O Himmat! We have remembered thee with a remembrance before which all mention hath bowed down, and with an utterance round which circle the expressions of the chosen ones. Say: O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا همت قد ذکرناک بذکر خضعت له الاذکار و ببیان طاف حوله بیان الاخیار قل الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
